title: Separate expanded Release 121 from preserved and optimized editions
description: Create an additive expanded edition without modifying historical root source or replacing optimized Release 120.
close_reason: Release 121 stages and builds independently beside Releases 119 and 120.

title: Add contextual player assistance commands
description: Add GOALS, EXITS, HINT, RECAP, WHY, and USE commands while preserving traditional play.
close_reason: Optional assistance commands compile and the opening transcript exercises GOALS, EXITS, and RECAP.

title: Deepen white house exterior reactions
description: Add state-aware knocking, listening, climbing, board damage, and front-door responses.
close_reason: House, door, boards, windows, and roof attempts now receive specific state-aware responses.

title: Deepen mailbox and window interactions
description: Add hidden maintenance paperwork and specific window and mailbox reactions.
close_reason: Mailbox discovery and window reactions are implemented and transcript-proven.

title: Add optional songbird discovery
description: Allow following the songbird to reveal a hidden glade and collectible brass feather.
close_reason: Following the songbird reaches the optional Hidden Glade and brass feather in Frotz.

title: Add object affordance guidance
description: Make USE explain plausible secondary roles for tools and ritual objects without auto-solving puzzles.
close_reason: USE provides contextual affordance guidance while leaving concrete actions to the player.

title: Add explainable expanded failures
description: Remember selected failed experiments and explain them through WHY.
close_reason: Selected physical failures now store an explanation retrievable through WHY.

title: Add persistent exploration recap
description: Summarize important world-state changes and new expanded-edition discoveries.
close_reason: RECAP reports important original and expanded state changes, including the hidden glade.

title: Protect Zork voice in new prose
description: Keep additions dry, specific, bureaucratic, and period-compatible rather than meme-driven.
close_reason: New prose received a consistent dry, physical, and Great Underground Empire bureaucracy pass.

title: Validate reactive world train
description: Validate beadtrain structure, exact patches, compilation, story identity, and opening expanded transcript.
close_reason: Primary train validation, exact patching, compilation, verification, and opening transcript passed.

title: Add noncombat troll solution
description: Permit bribing the troll with genuine treasure while preserving combat and original interactions.
close_reason: A genuine-treasure bribe removes the troll while preserving canonical routes.

title: Add risky cyclops lullaby solution
description: Permit a three-turn calming song that competes with the cyclops impatience timer.
close_reason: The three-turn lullaby route compiles alongside the original appetite and Odysseus solutions.

title: Add thief bargaining interaction
description: Allow one negotiated treasure payment that produces a characteristic clue and remembered outcome.
close_reason: One-time bargaining consumes a real treasure, leaves a thief note, and is remembered.

title: Deepen dam machine feedback
description: Add state-aware dam and control-panel examination, listening, and failure responses.
close_reason: Dam and control panel now expose mechanism state and useful failure information.

title: Deepen exorcism object behavior
description: Add state-aware candles, bell resonance, and optional black-book pages without replacing the ceremony.
close_reason: Bell, candles, and black book gained additive state-aware responses while retaining the ceremony.

title: Add secondary object reactions
description: Give rope, mirrors, tools, food, and ritual objects additional believable responses and guidance.
close_reason: Representative tools, mirrors, food, water, rope, and ritual objects gained secondary affordances.

title: Document additive alternate-solution rules
description: Define that canonical solutions remain valid and new solutions must follow world logic rather than reduce puzzles to shortcuts.
close_reason: The design charter defines additive, logical, risk-preserving alternate-solution rules.

title: Surface NPC and world memory
description: Expose remembered troll, cyclops, thief, dam, ritual, house, and songbird outcomes through descriptions and RECAP.
close_reason: Meaningful NPC, machine, house, ritual, and discovery outcomes persist and surface through RECAP.

title: Publish expansion feature matrix and backlog
description: Document shipped interactions, validation coverage, and deeper future room-by-room expansion work.
close_reason: Feature matrix, validation policy, design charter, and next-train frontier are committed.

title: Validate living underground train
description: Compile Release 121, verify story headers and checksum, run expanded transcript, and close coupled trains.
close_reason: Release 121 compiled, verified, ran its deterministic expanded transcript, and produced an artifact.

title: Open the absurd-action parser
description: Accept reasonable grammatical forms for deliberately unreasonable player ideas without weakening canonical puzzle commands.
close_reason: Permissive fallback grammar now reaches comedy handlers while normal food, combat, throwing, wearing, and container actions retain canonical behavior.

title: Make the player throwable without new object slots
description: Support THROW SELF, HURL SELF AT objects, and self-directed parser experiments through the original ME object.
close_reason: SELF and MYSELF use the original ME object for harmless untargeted and targeted ballistics and weaponized-self responses.

title: Add troll ballistics and sacking
description: Support SACK TROLL, THROW TROLL AT things, PUT TROLL IN SACK, and KILL TROLL WITH SELF without changing defeat state.
close_reason: All flagship troll misconduct commands are transcript-proven; one-turn bemusement prevents same-turn random counterattacks without defeating or moving him.

title: Recognize nest cuisine and apparel
description: Give EAT NEST, WEAR NEST, SLEEP IN NEST, licking, hugging, and related avian real-estate experiments specific responses.
close_reason: The bird's nest now has state-aware eating, wearing, sleeping, licking, hugging, juggling, and abuse responses validated in Frotz.

title: Deepen tree abuse and forestry attempts
description: Recognize cutting down, eating, hugging, headbutting, shaking, riding, marrying, and throwing oneself at trees.
close_reason: Trees now answer physical, social, forestry, and self-collision experiments with escalating state-aware prose without falling or becoming portable.

title: Add absurd social verbs
description: Implement hugging, licking, wearing, riding, marrying, apologizing, insulting, complimenting, dancing, juggling, and headbutting across representative targets.
close_reason: Representative scenery, monsters, tools, containers, and self nouns now receive specific dry Zork-style social and physical responses.

title: Make voice and fit throwable
description: Support THROW VOICE, THROW VOICE AT objects, THROW FIT, and literalized wordplay through existing global parser objects.
close_reason: VOICE, WORDS, and FIT reuse existing global noun capacity and are transcript-proven without adding fake inventory or removing original vocabulary.

title: Record discovered foolishness
description: Add a FOLLY report that remembers notable ridiculous experiments without exposing unseen jokes.
close_reason: FOLLY, NONSENSE, and MISCHIEF report only misconduct categories actually discovered in the current game state.

title: Publish the adventurer misconduct catalog
description: Document supported absurd commands, noun reuse, non-destructive boundaries, troll bemusement, prose rules, and extension patterns.
close_reason: README, feature matrix, and Office of Adventurer Misconduct documentation now describe shipped commands, architecture, safety boundaries, and validation.

title: Validate the full comedy-reactivity train
description: Compile Release 121, verify story integrity, exercise self, voice, fit, nest, tree, sack, troll nonsense, treasure bribery, and FOLLY in Frotz, and close the train.
close_reason: Run 29678454152 passed beadtrain validation, Releases 119/120/121 verification, both builds, and the complete deterministic misconduct transcript.

title: Resolve exact Tara Glulx upstream state
description: Resolve Tara McGrew's live Glulx head, current master, merge base, branch drift, and complete source diff.
close_reason: Pinned Glulx commit 1ada70e, master and merge base 97b7b3d, and the complete seven-file delta are recorded.

title: Pin the current Glulx toolchain
description: Pin ZILF, Glazer, Glulxe, and a standard Glk implementation to immutable revisions and source hashes.
close_reason: ZILF 1.8, Glazer 1.2.0, Glulxe, and CheapGlk are locked with exact commits and the Glazer source tarball SHA-256.

title: Create Glulx provenance and licensing manifest
description: Record upstream lineage, exact pins, license boundaries, imported paths, local modifications, and branding restrictions before qualification.
close_reason: The provenance manifest and generated license manifest record source, toolchain, license hashes, normalization, and unofficial branding boundaries.

title: Inspect the archived zork1-glulx release
description: Inspect zork1-glulx.zip, inventory its files, verify story integrity, and record immutable checksums.
close_reason: The IF Archive ZIP and its LICENSE and zork1.ulx members are inventoried, checksum-locked, header-verified, and natively executed.

title: Build Tara's unchanged upstream Glulx source
description: Compile Tara's exact Glulx source commit without importing Release 120 or Release 121 source changes.
close_reason: Pinned ZILF and Glazer compile Tara's unchanged source into a reproducible repository-local ULX artifact.

title: Normalize deterministic upstream Glulx identity
description: Prevent wall-clock build dates from changing Tara's published Release 1 and serial 251203 identity.
close_reason: The pipeline changes exactly one generated assembly metadata serial and leaves Tara's ZIL source unmodified.

title: Verify and lock the Glulx artifact
description: Verify Glulx magic, VM version, memory layout, checksum, size, SHA-256, and deterministic build receipt.
close_reason: The 180736-byte Glulx 3.1.3 artifact is checksum-valid and fail-closed to SHA-256 15dd2b654693e4f1c63e09a2308de1f366913c13be080baa33af3f76c5679ac8.

title: Run native Glulxe and CheapGlk qualification
description: Build a standard native interpreter and run deterministic identity and opening routes against repository and archived stories.
close_reason: Both ULX artifacts print Release 1 / serial 251203, reach West of House, expose the mailbox, accept commands, and exit under pinned Glulxe/CheapGlk.

title: Prove every existing Z-machine edition still passes
description: Keep Historical Release 119, Optimized Release 120, and Expanded Release 121 independently supported and qualified.
close_reason: The preservation, optimized, expanded, beadtrain, artifact, and deterministic Frotz gates continue passing alongside the additive Glulx workflow.

title: Publish Glulx qualification and Release 120 frontier
description: Publish complete receipts and documentation and define the exact conservative Release 120 Glulx port layer.
close_reason: README, qualification record, provenance, CI, artifact uploads, and NEXT_TRAINS now establish the qualified baseline and the Release 120-only next train.
